full_text:
Wang Han 王含
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Han (王含). Defender of Yuecheng, surrendered on the loss of Hanzhong. Wang Han was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
